fields.summary: Create, edit, then delete a note
fields.description: Full note lifecycle for the demo user: a note is created, edited, then deleted via the confirmation dialog, leaving the list empty. Creates the note first so the edit/delete steps act on a known note (per-note ids are dynamic).

step.raw: Log in as the demo user and open the notes page.
step.rendered: Log in as the demo user and open the notes page.

step.raw: Create a note with a title and body using the New note button.
step.rendered: Create a note with a title and body using the New note button.

data.raw: title: Weekend plan; body: Hike and groceries
data.rendered: title: Weekend plan; body: Hike and groceries

result.raw: The note appears in the notes list with the title 'Weekend plan'.
result.rendered: The note appears in the notes list with the title 'Weekend plan'.

step.raw: Edit that note: open it with its Edit button, change the title, and save.
step.rendered: Edit that note: open it with its Edit button, change the title, and save.

result.raw: The note's title updates to 'Weekend plan (updated)' in the list.
result.rendered: The note's title updates to 'Weekend plan (updated)' in the list.

step.raw: Delete that note: click its Delete button and confirm in the confirmation dialog.
step.rendered: Delete that note: click its Delete button and confirm in the confirmation dialog.

result.raw: The note is removed and the empty-state message is shown again.
result.rendered: The note is removed and the empty-state message is shown again.
